items.title_zh: 美国延长伊朗停火协议后，标准普尔 500 指数上涨，纳斯达克指数创下新高：实时更新
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump extended the U.S. ceasefire with Iran on Tuesday afternoon.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统周二下午延长了美国与伊朗的停火期限。

items.title_en: Trump administration in advanced talks for Spirit Airlines rescue package, source says
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，特朗普政府正在就精神航空救援计划进行高级谈判
items.desc_en: The Trump administration is preparing to rescue ailing budget carrier Spirit Airlines.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普政府正准备拯救陷入困境的廉价航空公司精神航空。

items.title_en: Bank of America double upgrades this software stock, sees big boost from AI
items.title_zh: 美国银行双倍升级该软件股票，看到人工智能的巨大推动
items.desc_en: The bank's research arm double upgraded the messaging software name to buy from underperform.
items.desc_zh: 该银行的研究部门将消息软件名称从表现不佳的股票升级为买入。

items.title_en: Buy this family safety platform that's set to debut new products and features to draw customers, Bank of America says
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，购买这个家庭安全平台将推出新产品和功能以吸引客户
items.desc_en: Life360 could rally as a result of new product and feature releases, making the stock a buy, according to Bank of America.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行表示，Life360 可能会因新产品和功能的发布而上涨，从而使该股值得买入。

items.title_en: Life sciences lab real estate is clawing back from disaster. Here’s what that means for investors
items.title_zh: 生命科学实验室房地产正在从灾难中恢复过来。这对投资者意味着什么
items.desc_en: Life science laboratories saw a massive drop in demand last year after the NIH was forced to cancel billions of dollars in research grants.
items.desc_zh: 去年，在美国国立卫生研究院被迫取消数十亿美元的研究经费后，生命科学实验室的需求大幅下降。

items.title_en: Los Angeles becomes first major US school district to limit classroom screen time
items.title_zh: 洛杉矶成为美国第一个限制课堂屏幕时间的主要学区
items.desc_en: The school district, which serves about half a million students, is looking to reduce its reliance on devices after the pandemic.
items.desc_zh: 该学区为约 50 万学生提供服务，正在寻求在大流行后减少对设备的依赖。

items.title_en: Retail traders can now get long OpenAI as Robinhood's venture fund takes a stake
items.title_zh: 随着 Robinhood 风险基金入股，零售交易者现在可以做多 OpenAI
items.desc_en: Robinhood's proprietary investment vehicle has taken a $75 million stake in OpenAI, the trading company announced Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 贸易公司周三宣布，Robinhood 的专有投资工具已收购 OpenAI 价值 7500 万美元的股份。

items.title_zh: Xbox 降低 Game Pass 价格，但结束《使命召唤》第一天的访问
items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: Google unveils chips for AI training and inference in latest shot at Nvidia
items.title_zh: 谷歌在与英伟达的最新合作中推出了用于人工智能训练和推理的芯片
items.desc_en: Google is packing ample amounts of static random access memory into a dedicated chip for running artificial intelligence models, following Nvidia's plans.
items.desc_zh: 按照英伟达的计划，谷歌正在将大量静态随机存取存储器装入专用芯片中，用于运行人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Boeing narrows loss as aircraft deliveries rise, says it expects new 737 Max certifications this year
items.title_zh: 波音公司表示，随着飞机交付量的增加，亏损收窄，预计今年将获得新的 737 Max 认证
items.desc_en: Boeing expects certification of new Max 7 and 10 models later this year,  with deliveries starting in 2027.
items.desc_zh: 波音预计新的 Max 7 和 Max 10 型号将在今年晚些时候获得认证，并于 2027 年开始交付。

items.title_en: Best Buy names Jason Bonfig as new CEO, replacing Corie Barry in late October
items.title_zh: 百思买于 10 月底任命 Jason Bonfig 为新任首席执行官，接替 Corie Barry
items.desc_en: The leadership change comes as the company tries to rev up sales and capitalize on artificial intelligence-fueled innovation of laptops and mobile phones.
items.desc_zh: 此次领导层变动之际，该公司正试图提高销售额并利用人工智能推动的笔记本电脑和手机创新。

items.title_en: Mortgage rates sink again, and home buyers jump back in
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率再次下降，购房者重新涌入
items.desc_en: Mortgage demand continues to rebound as rates sink slightly lower.
items.desc_zh: 随着利率小幅下降，抵押贷款需求继续反弹。

items.title_en: Palantir inks $300 million deal with USDA to safeguard food supply
items.title_zh: Palantir 与美国农业部签署 3 亿美元协议以保障食品供应
items.desc_en: Palantir is continuing to diversify its business beyond cornerstone military and defense contracts.
items.desc_zh: Palantir 正在继续实现业务多元化，超越基石军事和国防合同。

items.title_en: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
items.title_zh: 由于燃油价格飙升，汉莎航空削减了 20,000 个夏季航班
items.desc_en: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.
items.desc_zh: 由于美以与伊朗的战争导致航空燃油价格飙升，该航空公司是最新一家削减航班的航空公司。

items.title_en: EU decides on key €90bn Ukraine loan after pipeline deadlock ends
items.title_zh: 管道僵局结束后欧盟决定向乌克兰提供900亿欧元关键贷款
items.desc_en: The funding was agreed last December, but it has been held up in a row over Russian oil supplies to Hungary.
items.desc_zh: 这笔资金是去年12月达成的，但由于俄罗斯向匈牙利供应石油而被搁置。

items.title_en: Two ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz, UK says, after U.S. extends Iran ceasefire
items.title_zh: 英国称，美国延长伊朗停火协议后，两艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡遭到袭击
items.desc_en: The attacks come shortly after President Donald Trump said the U.S. would extend the ceasefire with Iran to allow peace talks to continue.
items.desc_zh: 在唐纳德·特朗普总统表示美国将延长与伊朗的停火以允许和平谈判继续进行后不久，袭击发生了。

items.title_zh: 报告发现，韩国战斗机因飞行员拍照而相撞
items.desc_en: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.
items.desc_zh: 其中一名飞行员被军方罚款数千美元，以支付维修费用。

items.desc_zh: 台湾指责北京向非洲国家施压，要求其对黎智英的飞机关闭领空。

items.title_zh: 印度三天内第二次烟花爆炸造成13人死亡
items.desc_en: Earlier this week, an explosion at a firecracker factory in neighbouring state Tamil Nadu left at least 25 dead.
items.desc_zh: 本周早些时候，邻邦泰米尔纳德邦一家鞭炮工厂发生爆炸，造成至少 25 人死亡。

items.desc_zh: 冲突洞察组织（CIG）表示，其研究还显示了阿联酋参与的程度。

items.title_en: Mexico officials say Teotihuacán gunman carried material related to US mass shooting
items.title_zh: 墨西哥官员称特奥蒂瓦坎枪手携带与美国大规模枪击事件有关的材料
items.desc_en: The gunman visited the archaeological site repeatedly and appeared to act alone.
items.desc_zh: 枪手多次造访考古遗址，且似乎是单独行动。

items.title_en: US singer D4vd pleads not guilty to murder in death of missing teen girl
items.title_zh: 美国歌手 D4vd 对失踪少女死亡的谋杀罪不认罪
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say the singer, real name David Anthony Burke, could face life in prison due to the nature of the case, if convicted.
items.desc_zh: 检察官表示，由于案件的性质，这位真名大卫·安东尼·伯克的歌手如果被定罪，可能面临终身监禁。

items.title_en: Virginia approves redistricting, giving Democrats edge in midterms
items.title_zh: 弗吉尼亚州批准重新划分选区，使民主党在中期选举中占据优势
items.desc_en: The new maps in Virginia could make it easier for Democrats to take control of the US House of Representatives in November.
items.desc_zh: 弗吉尼亚州的新地图可能会让民主党在 11 月更容易控制美国众议院。

items.title_en: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
items.title_zh: 经过一天的疯狂外交后，特朗普为伊朗协议争取了时间
items.desc_en: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time
items.desc_zh: 美国总统的决定标志着他在几周内第二次放弃了升级战争的威胁，从而赢得了更多时间

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Trump recounts Tim Cook call to 'kiss my ass,' in stark look at White House dealmaking
items.title_zh: 特朗普重述蒂姆·库克的“亲我屁股”呼吁，赤裸裸地看待白宫交易
items.desc_en: Tech executives from Amazon, Apple, Google and Meta have dined with Trump and donated millions to his inauguration fund and the White House ballroom.
items.desc_zh: 来自亚马逊、苹果、谷歌和 Meta 的科技高管曾与特朗普共进晚餐，并向他的就职基金和白宫宴会厅捐赠了数百万美元。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
